error.invalid_gateway_id: Gateway ID must be 8 characters long and start with *.

data_description.gateway_id: ID of your Gateway, including '*', e.g.: *ABCD123

credentials.description: Enter your Threema Gateway ID and secret obtained from gateway.threema.ch.
credentials.title: Gateway credentials

setup_new.description:
Your keys have been generated. Save them now before continuing!

Public key: `{public_key}`
Private key: `{private_key}`

When registering at gateway.threema.ch, paste only the hex part of the public key (without the `public:` prefix). Store the private key securely.
setup_new.title: Keys generated

error.invalid_recipient_id: Threema ID must be exactly 8 alphanumeric characters.

data_description.name: Optional friendly name for this recipient (e.g. 'Dad').
data_description.recipient: The 8-character Threema ID of the recipient.

user.description: Enter the Threema ID of the person you want to send messages to.
user.title: Add recipient
